title: AuditEvent
description: An append-only audit event in the HVOS Audit Trail. Deliberately non-rigid: entity_type and action are plain strings here (no enum) and are validated only against an injectable vocabulary in engine.audit.config. before/after are free-form snapshots (either may be null). additionalProperties is allowed so producers can attach extra context without a schema change. The contract carries no valuation math and enforces no workflow.

event_id.description: Stable identifier. Auto-generated on record when not supplied.

entity_type.description: Kind of entity the event concerns (e.g. assumption, comparable). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum.

entity_id.description: The entity's own identifier (e.g. assumption_id, comparable_id).

action.description: What happened (e.g. created, overridden, assessed, inclusion_recommended). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum.

actor.description: Who performed the action; null for system/automated events.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Auto-generated when not supplied.

before.description: Snapshot of the prior state. Null when none (e.g. creation).

after.description: Snapshot of the new state. Null when not applicable.

rationale.description: Why the action was taken, carried from the source entity.

explanation.description: Human-readable breakdown carried from the source entity (list of lines).
